one_time_description: Settlement offer from Government of Canada for Rebecca Spit - Drew Harbour IR9 Specific Claim for $15,000,000, authorized April 3, 2023 and received May 8, 2023 (subsequent event)
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business interests including retail, natural resource, and industrial businesses. GBEs had combined revenue of $51,985,254 and net income of $7,671,887 in 2023. Key enterprises include forestry, marine terminals, campsites, resort, liquor store, service station, and fisheries partnerships. Bryden Road (Kelowna) Limited Partnership newly added in 2023 with investment of $5,010,037.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023). Nation has 4 consolidated subsidiaries (Quinsam Properties BT Inc., Quinsam Reserve Leasing Inc., 1223053 BC Ltd., Cape Mudge Developments Ltd.) and 14 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Significant subsequent event: $15M specific claims settlement for Rebecca Spit IR9 received in May 2023 not reflected in these statements. Large increase in deferred revenue ($16.9M vs $1.7M prior year) driven primarily by $10,764,000 Province of BC ITA Funding and $3,271,079 Property Lease Revenue deferred. Accounts receivable jumped from $2.3M to $13.7M. No remuneration schedule included in provided financial statement text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + FNHA + CMHC + NVIATS + KDC + FNESC + BC Hydro = 6,764,949 + 2,215,622 + 702,938 + 80,466 + 95,301 + 83,600 + 245,668 + 2,653,084 = 12,841,628; OSR = 23,720,161 - 12,841,628 = 10,878,533. Education expenses not separately broken out in segment schedule provided. Community Development $1,390,530 and Economic Development $1,720,957 also noted.
